hooks.command: file=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$file" == */sc_tools/*.py ]]; then echo '[hook] Linting sc_tools after edit...'; ruff check "$file" --quiet && echo '[hook] lint OK' || echo '[hook] lint FAILED — run make lint to fix'; fi
